title: chore(deps): update dependency openapi-schema-validator to ~=0.7.1
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | [Age](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [Confidence](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |
|---|---|---|---|
| [openapi-schema-validator](https://redirect.github.com/python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator) | `~=0.6.2` → `~=0.7.1` | ![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/pypi/openapi-schema-validator/0.7.1?slim=true) | ![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/pypi/openapi-schema-validator/0.6.3/0.7.1?slim=true) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator (openapi-schema-validator)</summary>

### [`v0.7.1`](https://redirect.github.com/python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator/releases/tag/0.7.1)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator/compare/0.7.0...0.7.1)

#### Features

- Add OpenAPI 3.2.0 support (OAS32Validator) [#​256](https://redirect.github.com/python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator/issues/256)

### [`v0.7.0`](https://redirect.github.com/python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator/releases/tag/0.7.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator/compare/0.6.3...0.7.0)

#### Features

- OAS30 strict validator [#​251](https://redirect.github.com/python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator/issues/251)

#### Fixes

- Ignore readOnly/writeOnly set to False [#​248](https://redirect.github.com/python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator/issues/248)
- Discriminator handling for non-object instances [#​249](https://redirect.github.com/python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator/issues/249)
- Narrower handling around unresolved refs [#​250](https://redirect.github.com/python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator/issues/250)

#### Breaking changes

- OAS30Validator with schema type string only accepts str (before accepted both str and bytes) [#​251](https://redirect.github.com/python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator/issues/251)
- Added support for Python 3.12, 3.13 and 3.14 [#​205](https://redirect.github.com/python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator/issues/205) [#​247](https://redirect.github.com/python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator/issues/247)
- Dropped support for Python 3.8 and 3.9 [#​205](https://redirect.github.com/python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator/issues/205) [#​246](https://redirect.github.com/python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator/issues/246)

</details>

---
